authors.author: Judson Wheeler Van DeVenter
Winfield Scott Weeden
Alles will ich Jesus weihen (Alles geb ich dir)

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Broken, torn apart This empty and lonely road Restless, blown by the wind Wandering, I am lost My heart is calling You My soul is weary and cold

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I bow down to surrender Here I am at the mercy of Your grace I beg Your forgiveness Here I am in the promises of Your love Pardon and remember me This life, I surrender

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I see mountains ahead And I fear those deep rivers Darkness will soon return Praying, You'll be here on time My heart is calling You My soul is weary and cold

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Broken, torn apart This empty and lonely road
